creator: river@loreley.flyingparchment.org.uk
text:
AT&T ksh has been updated to a new version, 2009-05-05, and the older version
is no longer available for download.  this breaks the build:

=> INIT.2008-11-04.tgz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/ksh93.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.research.att.com/~gsf/download/tgz/.
fetch: http://www.research.att.com/~gsf/download/tgz/INIT.2008-11-04.tgz: Gone

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/shells/ksh93; make install
